name: Egghead
description: Egghead — concise video tutorial platform for professional web developers covering React, TypeScript, Node, and modern tooling.

seo.title: Egghead — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Egghead: Egghead — concise video tutorial platform for professional web developers covering React, TypeScript, Node, and modern tooling.

when_to_use: Concise React hooks video course consumed during commute
TypeScript generics explained in 5-minute focused lessons
Next.js App Router course for experienced frontend developers
RxJS deep-dive series for senior engineers leveling up
Course purchased to upskill team on testing with Vitest

pros: Concise, high-signal videos by working professionals
Strong React, TypeScript, and modern-tooling coverage
Instructor roster includes well-known OSS authors
Production values and editing are consistently polished
cons: Catalog narrower than Frontend Masters or Udemy
Subscription cost adds up for casual learners
Some older courses become outdated quickly
No interactive exercises - pure video format
review.verdict: High-quality bite-sized video learning for working web devs; limited if you need breadth or hands-on.
review.best_for: Professional web developers who want quick, high-signal upskilling on modern JS tooling.
review.not_for: Absolute beginners or learners wanting interactive exercises and broad curriculum coverage.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
